Sunset.description: Date after which this endpoint will be removed, in RFC 7231 date format.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. E.g. no parameter was set

Unauthorized.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

alarm_condition_type.description: Type of alarm (i.e Upper limit, connection timeout)

alarm_reason.description: Reason which caused the alarm (e.g. alarm condition is violated)

alarm_source_uuid.description: Uuid of source that caused the alarm (e.g. sensor_uuid, device_uuid)

alarm_time.description: Time the alarm occurred in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“ in UTC

alarm_time_local.description: Time the alarm occurred in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“ in local Timezone

alarm_value.description: Measurement value which caused the alarm

customer_site_uuid.description: Actual Restaurant/Site the alarm occurred in

last_status_change_time.description: Last time the status of the alarm condition changed in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“

physical_value.description: Physical value defines channel of alarm (e.g. Temperature, Humidity, Door)

physical_value_extension.description: Physical extension defines channel of alarm (e.g. Product Temperature, Relative Humidity, Door Contact)

processed_at.description: Time the alarm was received by the Testo Cloud

serial_no.description: Serial number of the sensor which has detected the alarm

source_alarm_event_uuid.description: Source alarm uuid related to the back to normal (only set in case of back to normal)

tenant_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the tenant account in which the datalogger is registered

channel_equipment_parts_uuid.description: Unique channel equipment part identifier which the sensor is assigned to

channel_no.description: Number to identify a specific channel of a sensor if it has multiple ones

device_created_at.description: Time point where the device was created in UTC “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ”

device_equipment_uuid.description: Unique equipment identifier which the device is assigned to

is_calibration_possible.description: Is the probe calibratable (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_ethernetprobe.description: Is the probe an ethernet probe (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_external.description: Is the probe external (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_powersupplieable.description: Is the probe powersupplieable (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_wirelessprobe.description: Is the probe a radio probe (0 for no, 1 for yes)

limit_values_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the limit values set active for the device

physical_extension.description: Physical extension defines channel (e.g. Air Temperature, Absolute Humidity, Door Contact)

physical_property_name.description: Physical property name of channel (e.g. Temperature, Density, Door)

physical_unit_exponent.description: Exponent of the measurement - Number represents amount of decimal places

sensor_equipment_parts_uuid.description: Unique equipment part identifier which the sensor is assigned to

channel_physical_property_name.description: Physical property name of channel (e.g. Temperature, Density, Door)

device_category.description: The category of the device such as LOGGER, GATEWAY, etc.

device_is_active.description: Denotes that whether device is active or not

device_is_ethernetprobe.description: Is the probe an ethernet probe

device_is_wirelessprobe.description: Is the probe a radio probe

device_last_modified.description: Time point where the device was last modified in iso8601 format

device_measuring_cycle.description: Interval of device measuring cycle time (in milliseconds)

device_measuring_cycle_effective.description: Interval of device effective measuring cycle time (in milliseconds)

device_supported_battery_types.description: Supported battery types of the device

status_time.description: Time of the sensor status in UTC “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ”

alarm_log_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the alarm (map alarm_log_uuid to uuid of Alarms api)

app_version.description: Version of the installed app on the control unit

content.description: Context information of the task/process step

context.description: Context information of the task/process step

has_corrective_action.description: One of the process steps of this task execution was marked as correctiveAction

marked_as_deleted.description: Detail information for a process step (e.g manual temperature measurements)

parameters.description: Context information of the task/process step

process_control_title.description: Title of the specific process control in the quality manual

process_control_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the specific process control in the quality manual

process_ctrl_category_title.description: Title of the specific process control category in the quality manual (e.g. stationary monitoring)

process_ctrl_category_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the process control category

process_step_corrective_action.description: “Is this step of the task a corrective action“ flag

process_step_instructions.description: Detail description of a step of a task

process_step_type.description: Definition of process step type (e.g. make comment, take photo, input number)

processed_at.description: UTC timestamp of the time the data was processed in the API backend in format “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ”

sequence_no.description: Sequence number of process step (1 is the first step of the task)

serial_no_tablet.description: Serial number of tablet the task was executed

shift_begin.description: Time point of the shift start in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“

shift_end.description: Time point of the shift end in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“

shift_uuid.description: Unique identifier of shift the task was scheduled for (null for FLEXIBLE_PLANNED tasks)

site_name.description: Name of the restaurant/location which executed the task. DEPRECATED: This field is not always accurate. For reliable information, retrieve the tenant details using the tenant_uuid from this response with the /v2/tenants-sync or /v2/tenants async endpoint and use the 'organisation_name' field instead.

site_number.description: Optional restaurant/location identifier. DEPRECATED: This field is not always accurate. For reliable information, retrieve the tenant details using the tenant_uuid from this response with the /v2/tenants-sync or /v2/tenants async endpoint and use the 'organisation_id' field instead.

task_execution_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the task execution

task_status.description: Status of the task execution (e.g. PAUSED or FINISHED)

task_timestamp_end.description: Time point of the end of the task execution in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“

task_timestamp_start.description: Time point of the start of the task execution in “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ“

task_type.description: Task type (e.g. ALARM, ADHOC, PLANNED or FLEXIBLE_PLANNED)

timestamp.description: Timestamp the process step was reached

user_uuid.description: Unique identifier of user who executed the task

username.description: Username of the user who executed the task

uuid.description: Unique identifier of the flat process step joint with task

country.description: Country the tenant is located in (e.g. DE)

is_operator.description: Is the tenant an restaurant tenant?

main_language.description: Main language of the tenant (e.g. de_DE)

main_timezone.description: Main timezone of the tenant (e.g. Europe/Berlin)

parent_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the parent tenant account

register_time.description: Time point when the tenant was registered in UTC “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ”

tenant_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the tenant account

attenuation.description: Is the probe external (0 for no, 1 for yes)

channel_no.description: Number to identify a specific channel of a sensor if he has multiple

equipment_parts_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the equipment part

is_calibration_possible.description: Is the probe calibratable (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_external.description: Is the probe external (0 for no, 1 for yes)

limit_values_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the devices alarm configuration limit value

physical_extension.description: Physical value and physical extension defines channel of alarm

physical_unit_exponent.description: Exponent of the measurement - Number represents amount of decimal places

DeviceStatus.description: This object represents a device status

tenant_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the tenant account

GeneralAsyncOptionsV3.description: Additional parameters, such as the file format of the result.

result_file_format.description: Type of the result. If not defined, the result file format will be CSV. Hint: The number of files differs depending on the file format.

GeneralAsyncRequest.description: This object represents a general asynchronous request, which allows query data for a specific time range

date_time_from.description: Timestamp to define start point for data, if not defined, the date_time_from would be one hour before the current time

date_time_until.description: Timestamp to define end point for data, if not defined, the date_time_until would be one hour after the date_time_from

options.description: This property allows to define additional parameters, such as the file format of the result.

result_file_format.description: Type of the result, if not defined, the result file format would be CSV. Hint: The number of files differ depending on the file format

GeneralAsyncRequestV1.description: This object represents a general asynchronous request without a time range

date_time_from.description: Timestamp to define start point for data, if not defined, the date_time_from would be one hour before the current timewe (Note: This parameter is currently inactive)

date_time_until.description: Timestamp to define end point for data, if not defined, the date_time_until would be one hour after the date_time_from (Note: This parameter is currently inactive)

options.description: This property allows to define additional parameters, such as the file format of the result.

result_file_format.description: Type of the result, if not defined, the result file format would be CSV. Hint: The number of files differ depending on the file format

GeneralAsyncRequestV2.description: This object represents a general asynchronous request v2, which allows query data with specific options

options.description: This property allows to define additional parameters, such as the file format of the result.

result_file_format.description: Type of the result. If not defined the result file format would be CSV. Hint: The number of files differ depending on the file format.

GeneralAsyncRequestV3.description: General asynchronous request, which allows querying data with specific options and optional OData-style query parameters.

allOf.description: General asynchronous request with a date time range.

date_time_from.description: Timestamp defining the start for data. If not defined, date_time_from defaults to one hour before the current time.

date_time_until.description: Timestamp defining the end for data. If not defined, date_time_until defaults to one hour after date_time_from.

GeneralAsyncSuccessResponse.description: This object represents a general asynchronous success response

ODataQueryOptions.description: Optional OData system query options (applied to the result set).

$filter.description: Filter expression using OData operators (eq, ne, gt, ge, lt, le, and, or, not) and functions (contains, startswith, endswith, etc.)

$orderby.description: Comma-separated list of columns with optional 'asc' or 'desc' direction

$select.description: Comma-separated list of column names to include in the response

created_at.description: The iso8601 date time for the time the device was created at

equipment_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the equipment connected to the device

is_ethernetprobe.description: Is the probe an ethernet probe (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_powersuppliable.description: Is the probe powersupplieable (0 for no, 1 for yes)

is_wirelessprobe.description: Is the probe a radio probe (0 for no, 1 for yes)

tenant_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the tenant account

equipment_parts_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the equipment part

sensor_is_active.description: Is the sensor active (0 for no, 1 for yes)

SensorStatus.description: This object represents a sensor status

tenant_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the tenant account

TokenRequest.description: This object represents a token request

TokenResponse.description: This object represents a token response

odata.$filter: alarm_status eq 'Ok' and alarm_severity eq 'Alarm' and tenant_uuid eq 'c0514728-da91-431c-8eb3-8f815c5ddcbd'
